description: Monitored and high-attention EVM selectors SafeTx should flag before an AI agent signs a RealFi transaction. A match is not always malicious, but it requires stronger intent alignment and user confirmation.

selectors.name: ERC20 transfer(address,uint256)
selectors.recommendation: Confirm recipient, token, amount, and policy limits before wallet handoff.

selectors.name: ERC20 approve(address,uint256)
selectors.recommendation: Confirm spender and amount. Prefer limited approvals over unlimited approvals.

selectors.name: ERC20 transferFrom(address,address,uint256)
selectors.recommendation: Confirm owner, recipient, allowance source, and amount before wallet handoff.

selectors.name: ERC2612 permit(address,address,uint256,uint256,uint8,bytes32,bytes32)
selectors.recommendation: Treat as off-chain approval. Confirm the owner, spender, value, and deadline before wallet handoff.

selectors.name: Permit2 approve(address,address,uint160,uint48)
selectors.recommendation: Verify token, spender, amount, and expiration. Permit2 approvals are frequently abused by phishing flows.

selectors.name: increaseAllowance(address,uint256)
selectors.recommendation: Verify this is expected. Unknown allowance increases should be treated as suspicious.

selectors.name: setApprovalForAll(address,bool)
selectors.recommendation: Confirm the operator and collection. This can grant control over all NFTs in a collection.

selectors.name: swapExactTokensForTokens(uint256,uint256,address[],address,uint256)
selectors.recommendation: Confirm router, token path, recipient, amountOutMin, slippage, and deadline before wallet handoff.

selectors.name: swapTokensForExactTokens(uint256,uint256,address[],address,uint256)
selectors.recommendation: Confirm maximum input, token path, recipient, slippage, and deadline before wallet handoff.

selectors.name: swapExactETHForTokens(uint256,address[],address,uint256)
selectors.recommendation: Confirm native value, token path, recipient, amountOutMin, slippage, and deadline before wallet handoff.

selectors.name: swapExactTokensForETH(uint256,uint256,address[],address,uint256)
selectors.recommendation: Confirm token input, PHRS output path, recipient, amountOutMin, slippage, and deadline before wallet handoff.

selectors.name: swapTokensForExactETH(uint256,uint256,address[],address,uint256)
selectors.recommendation: Confirm maximum token input, native output target, recipient, slippage, and deadline before wallet handoff.

selectors.name: swapETHForExactTokens(uint256,address[],address,uint256)
selectors.recommendation: Confirm native value, exact output target, token path, recipient, and deadline before wallet handoff.

selectors.name: exactInputSingle((address,address,uint24,address,uint256,uint256,uint160))
selectors.recommendation: Confirm tokenIn, tokenOut, fee tier, recipient, amountIn, amountOutMinimum, and sqrtPriceLimit before wallet handoff.

selectors.name: exactInput(bytes,address,uint256,uint256)
selectors.recommendation: Decode the path bytes and confirm route, recipient, amountIn, and amountOutMinimum before wallet handoff.

selectors.name: exactOutputSingle((address,address,uint24,address,uint256,uint256,uint160))
selectors.recommendation: Confirm tokenIn, tokenOut, fee tier, recipient, exact output, maximum input, and price limit before wallet handoff.

selectors.name: exactOutput(bytes,address,uint256,uint256)
selectors.recommendation: Decode the path bytes and confirm route, recipient, exact output, and maximum input before wallet handoff.

selectors.name: Universal Router execute(bytes,bytes[])
selectors.recommendation: Decode nested router commands before wallet handoff. Router execute calls can bundle swaps, transfers, and approvals.

selectors.name: Universal Router execute(bytes,bytes[],uint256)
selectors.recommendation: Decode nested router commands and confirm deadline before wallet handoff.

selectors.name: deposit()
selectors.recommendation: Confirm wrapped/native token deposit target and native value before wallet handoff.

selectors.name: deposit(uint256)
selectors.recommendation: Confirm vault contract, input token, amount, and policy limits before wallet handoff.

selectors.name: deposit(uint256,address)
selectors.recommendation: Confirm vault contract, assets amount, receiver, and expected shares before wallet handoff.

selectors.name: withdraw(uint256)
selectors.recommendation: Confirm withdrawal amount, recipient behavior, and any unstaking delay before wallet handoff.

selectors.name: withdraw(uint256,address,address)
selectors.recommendation: Confirm assets amount, receiver, owner, and vault policy before wallet handoff.

selectors.name: redeem(uint256,address,address)
selectors.recommendation: Confirm shares amount, receiver, owner, and expected asset output before wallet handoff.

selectors.name: stake(uint256)
selectors.recommendation: Confirm staking contract, token, amount, lockup, and unstaking conditions before wallet handoff.

selectors.name: getReward()
selectors.recommendation: Confirm reward contract and that the call is claim-only before wallet handoff.

selectors.name: claim()
selectors.recommendation: Confirm claim contract and that no unexpected value or approval is attached.

selectors.name: supply(address,uint256,address,uint16)
selectors.recommendation: Confirm asset, amount, onBehalfOf address, referral code, and protocol target before wallet handoff.

selectors.name: withdraw(address,uint256,address)
selectors.recommendation: Confirm asset, amount, recipient, and protocol target before wallet handoff.

selectors.name: borrow(address,uint256,uint256,uint16,address)
selectors.recommendation: Confirm borrowed asset, amount, rate mode, onBehalfOf address, collateral impact, and liquidation risk before wallet handoff.

selectors.name: repay(address,uint256,uint256,address)
selectors.recommendation: Confirm repayment asset, amount, rate mode, and beneficiary address before wallet handoff.
